mods.name: Splatoon 2 colors in Splatoon 1 (color locks)
mods.author: Manto._.lol
mods.description:
Splatoon 1 color lock, splatoon 2 colors
Splatoon 2 colors from turf are now in Splatoon 1, as seperated color locks!

You can only use one color lock! For example if you have purple Vs orange and you wanna have pink Vs yellow, you gotta get the other color lock and restart the game and select it.

  DO NOT REPLACE THE TURF WAR RAW DATA COLOURS WITH THEM, IT WONT WORK! 

Where to put the color lock 
WiiU:
SD:/wiiu/sdcafiine/[TITLE ID]/color lock you choose
Cemu:
/graphicPack/Splatoon/Mods/color lock you choose

This mod replaces Inklings with their Parallel Canon versions from Side Order.
The mod includes the order suit, replacing:

This also uses a Static.pack edit in order to "fix" the missing shoulders and chest from the Order Suit, you can just delete the Static.pack if you want to, it's an optional file, in case that you'll use it, please use nohash

Bah bah! Yoshi!
This mod replaces the inklings with koopas and dry bones! It also replaces the rival octolings with Yoshi!
----------------------------------------------

    Koopa with customizable customizable eyes!
    Dry Bones with customizable customizable eyes!

----------------------------------------------

    Dry bones model (Done!)
    Yoshi over rival octolings (Done!)
    Fixed hat positions (in progress)

mods.name: SplatFest mania (Splat1._.Fest splatfests)
mods.author: Submitter Th3OctoG1rl Key Authors      The splat1._.Fest team         Everything     -273.15         Standby and loading screens
mods.description:
Fests for every1!!
Welcome to splatfest mania, this is a gamebanana page where the fest files used inside Splat1._.Fest will be posted by me, Jelly.
This is made so we can distribute the files more easily.

Current fest (Sunrise vs Sunset) has a new custom sunset look for fests!

What do the files usually include?
-New remodeled fest plaza
-New music
-New Standby intro
-New sounds
-Splatfest colorlock
-The most important thing, splatfest files

DO NOT USE PRETENDO FEST MATCHMAKING, IT DOES NOT WORK AT THE MOMENT 
However, you can vote to get the fest tees. Even tho the fest tees are always added over 2 in-game tees.
EVERYTHING ELSE SHOULD BE ONLINE SAFE ON PRETENDO

How to install custom Splatfests?

 1: Download the files from the page you are in right now. The files will be posted around a week before the Splatfest happens.

2: Follow the instructions for your device! 

-CEMU :     

           1. Copy all the files you downloaded.

           2. Go into your Cemu and open following path:

               mlc01\usr\boss\00050000\(title id)\user\common\data\optdat2

           3. Check  that the names of the downloaded files match the one already existing!!!        

          4. Overwrite the files that are already in there.

          5. If you connect to the internet now ( and the Fest/Preparation has begun) you should be able   to see the Splatfest announcement.

-WII U:    

            1. Boot up your Wii U and open FTPiiU on the plugins menu

            2. Connect to the Wii U via Filezilla by entering the Wii U's IP and port inside there.

            3. Search for following path:

    storage_mlc/usr/boss/00050000/(title id)/user/common/data/optdat2

            4. Check  that the names of the downloaded files match the one already existing!!!

            5. Overwrite the files in there.

            6. Disconnect Filezilla and open the game. 

            7. The Fest should show up.

Please backup your Save-Data and the data you replace.

Title ID's: 10162b00 = JPN, 1017e300 = EU, 10176900= US

How do I join matches?
-Join the discord server! link: https://discord.gg/QX94gvsvwS
-Ask if anyone is matchmaking or if the fest is still up
-Have fun!

Credits: 
-HSS for making the loading screen and standby
mods.license: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 4.0 Unported License.

mods.name: Bravo spawns for msn maps & Spawns for dojo maps
mods.author: KiwiTheServerCrasher
mods.description:
This mod adds spawns for team bravo (enemy team) in some story mode maps and to all dojo maps. This prevents one of the teams (if you select a story mode stage online in private battles) from falling forever to the void because they didn't have a spawn position. This mod was mainly created to use it online in private battles (with some hack that allows you to play these stages online) and not in story mode and dojo (tho you can use it in them)

NOTE: EVERY PLAYER IN THE LOBBY NEEDS TO USE THIS MOD OR ELSE IT WILL CAUSE DESYNCS!

Here's a list of the maps this mod currently modifies:

Octoling Invasion (ID: 1008)
Unidentified Flying Object (ID: 1009)
Octoling Assault (ID: 1014)
Undeniable Flying Object (ID: 1015)
Spinning Spreaders (ID: 1018)
Octoling Uprising (ID: 1020)
Unwelcome Flying Object (ID: 1021)
Octoling Onslaught (ID: 1026)
Unavoidable Flying Object (ID: 1027)
Mouth Boss (ID: 1104)
Dojo Urchin Underpass (ID: 2000)
Dojo Walleye Warehouse (ID: 2001)
Dojo Saltspray Rig (ID: 2002)
Dojo Arowana Mall (ID: 2003)
Dojo Blackbelly Skatepark (ID: 2004)

I know the number of maps is kinda limited but I'll see if I can add more to this list in the future.

NOTE THAT THIS MOD ALSO MODIFIES THE STAGES IN STORY MODE. THIS MOD CAUSES SOME OF THE STAGES TO BE IMPOSSIBLE TO BEAT DUE TO THE SPAWN BLOCKING ACCESS TO THE ZAPFISH.

THIS IS A STATIC PACK EDIT, I DON'T KNOW IF NOHASH IS NEEDED FOR THIS TO WORK ONLINE BUT USE IT ANYWAY

this mod should be safe to use online as it only modifies the story mode maps and doesn't do anything to normal maps.

If you find anything weird in this mod, warn me. I guess this mod works on CEMU too but I haven't tested that.

mods.name: Playable Kirby and Waddle Dee BETA v0.4
mods.author: Claygolor
mods.description:
The Inklings are taking a break!
This mod replaces the player with Kirby and Waddle Dee, fully playable.

What does this mod includes?
Kirby and Waddle Dee as playable characters with their own animations from Kirby games.
Shadow Kirby as rival Octolings.
Jelly copy ability as squids and octopuses.
The 3 characters have their own voices.
Some Kirby copy ability hats (most of them are replacing glasses)
Legendary Air Ride Machine: Hydra, replacing the Kraken.
Includes some Kirby themes for battles and lobby (most of them are from Dream Buffet)



Known bugs:
Rollers, brushes and snipers doesn't work perfectly.
Face animations not displaying properly.
Weird model distortion in Moray Towers and Blackbelly Skatepark.


Future updates:
Model improvement.
Team colored characters.
More headgear and clothing compatibility.
Ink tank compatibility.
Missing player voices.
Amiibo animations.
And more!


The mod is compatible with Rival Unpatch (allows you to play as Shadow Kirby), the Cemu files already include the patch and the Wii U files include the aroma patch in case that you don't have it.


The mod is still a BETA! 
Not all the vanilla headgear works fine for the characters, ink tanks aren't visible and there are some visual bugs at some stages. I'll keep updating the mod frequently.

Please consider sending me a message or commenting on any other bugs or suggestions!
mods.license: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 4.0 Unported License.

mods.name: Splatoon+
mods.author: Delus1on_L
mods.description: We are introducing Splatoon+, a mod with the goals of adding new content to the game, in a series of updates similar to 9 years ago! This mod is for console AND Cemu. This adds 50 NEW pieces of gear and a new map for now.
requirements: Rival Unpatched (DO NOT USE THE PLAYER.PACK FROM RIVAL UNPATCHED! USE THE ONE INCLUDED WITH SPLATOON+ INSTEAD!)
mods.changelog:
1.3.2 - Set Mahi-Mahi Resort back to daytime. Fix the rules.txt file for cemu users.
1.3.1 - Made some visual improvements and adjustments for Port Trout. Adds a performance version for Mako Parking Lot.
1.3.0 - New font (Custom Dela Gothic One) which adds more japanese characters, alterna and the s2neon font characters, all wiiu system cafe font icons, weapon icons and more. (Thanks to All-Switch and einBirnenbaum). Adjusted the layout for the new font. Custom new enviroment for Walleye Warehouse and Mahi-Mahi Resort. New stage *Mako Parking Lot*, a parking lot themed stage with cars driving around and the Squid Sisters dancing on stage during fest time. (Idea and design by BagelB, layout and misc. by All-Switch). New lobby UI and design. (base design and idea by Hislasthope). Improved Octolings. Adjusted title screen info. Fixed transition texture. Fixed Splatfest progress bar. Fixed miscellaneous bugs. (Thanks to: einBirnenbaum and many more!).
1.2.0 - Version 1.2 introduces more support geared towards rival octolings. They now have their improved models from Splatoon 2 (along with the other two inkling player characters) and have more of a presence on the UI. This update also adds support for Spanish and French for US/EU copies of the game. See the changelog for more details!
1.1.0 - This update adds Port Trout, a new map to play on. It fixes 7 pieces of buggy gear, and adds some small things. A guide on how to unlock Port Trout will be added to the game banana page very soon.

mods.name: Sunset Maps
mods.author: TOKEN-CANARY
mods.description: WARNING: This mod might break some textures in the maps! Changes every (online multiplayer) map and most (story mode) maps to have sunset lighting/skybox.
mods.changelog:
1.4.0 - Made Port Mackerel's fog less intense. Fixed Saltspray Rig's fog.
1.3.0 - Changed fog color for the octo valley maps. Added sunset for every boss.
1.2.0 - Adds sunset for every Octo Valley mission and Octo Valley itself (excluding the bosses' maps, Inkvisible Avenues, Shifting Splatforms, Tubmling Splatforms, Undeniable Flying Object, Unwelcome Flying Object and Unavoidable Flying Object).
1.1.0 - Fixed an issue where in some maps the ink was shiny. Removed sunset skybox for Octo Valley, it was never meant to be there and was only made for testing purposes (As of 17/09/2022, it is now part of the mod again).
